reviews.comment:
Los mejores sándwiches. Por ellos es tan famoso. También un enorme parque para comerlos y muy buen baño.

(Translated by Google)
The best sandwiches. That's what it's so famous for. Also, a huge park to eat them in and a very good bathroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYbzQzUEdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Vianda comida para CILIAC@S. 10 PUNTOS. 1 PORCION DE TARTA DE VERDURA Y 1 MILANESA DE POLLO A PRECIO ACCESIBLE. Mesitas al aire libre. Dispensar de agua caliente gratuito. Baños amplios y limpios y con papel. Ecxelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
Lunch for people with celiac disease. 10 out of 10. One slice of vegetable tart and one breaded chicken cutlet at an affordable price. Outdoor tables. Free hot water dispenser. Spacious and clean restrooms with toilet paper. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYaF9LbGxBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar para hacer un alto en el viaje. El restaurante es chico pero muy bien atendido. Limpieza en los baños y un lindo lugar bajo los árboles para recomponer el cuerpo.

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place to stop during your trip. The restaurant is small but the service is excellent. The restrooms are clean, and there's a lovely spot under the trees to relax.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuNDZ2eEdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Tranquilo lugar para parar a pernoctar en mí casa rodante, los empleados no tuvieron problema, muy serviciales. Lo que sí, está cerca de la ruta N°3  por la que hay bastante tránsito y se escucha mucho el mismo.

(Translated by Google)
A quiet place to stay overnight in my RV. The staff were very helpful and had no problems. It's close to Route 3, which is heavily traveled, and you can hear it a lot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNucE1uOVFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es una estación con una exelente atención, dispone de un muy prolijo bar, sanitarios limpios y un gran parque para hacer picnic, matear y descansar un rato. Con mesitas y juegos para los chicos.

(Translated by Google)
It's a station with excellent service, a very clean bar, clean restrooms, and a large park for picnics, drinking mate, and relaxing. There are tables and games for the kids.
